name: Chat Guess Games
short_description: Chat Guess Games is a community game for Twitch Streamers. A game for your community to battle it out and see who truly knows the most about video games!
detailed_description:
The Videogame About Guessing Videogames!


Chat Guess Games is a community game for Twitch Streamers. A game for your community to battle it out and see who truly knows the most about video games!

Screenshots, artwork, genres, release year and more are displayed on screen and chat races to guess the correct videogame first!

  • Rounds can be started with chat commands or with one simple click in-game.
  • Autoplay mode where the rounds keep coming, perfect for engaging viewers during brb and starting screens or during community night.
  • Community Leaderboards to encourage competition in your community and Top Channel Leaderboards to compete against other channels and see which community is best at game trivia.
  • A retro-only category.
  • Almost 2,000 games to guess!
  • A great way to learn about new games.
